curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge (638ebff) with two parents. Pre-patch commit is first parent bafafa8. The patch adds nil checks in three locations: (1) MustAdd in index.go checks i.Entries != nil before map access, (2) loadIndex in index.go checks cvs[idx] != nil before accessing .APIVersion, and (3) Remove in repo.go checks rf != nil before accessing .Name. All three are null-deref fixes consistent with CWE-476. Only 2 non-test source files changed (pkg/repo/index.go and pkg/repo/repo.go), so the patch is not noisy. Pre-assigned class null-deref is correct.
